pi_items.source: examples/woo_commerce_env/scripts/setup_woocommerce.sh line 235: wp wc product create --name='Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' --sku='WBH-001'
examples/woo_commerce_env/scripts/setup_woocommerce.sh line 235: wp wc product create --name='Wireless Bluetooth Headphones'

Task description and verifier.py: task requires updating from original $79.99 to expected $59.99. Verifier expects this value (line 111) and task description line 5 confirms 'update its regular price from $79.99 to $59.99'
Task description and verifier.py: task requires setting sale price to $49.99. Task description line 5 confirms 'Also set a sale price of $49.99'. Verifier expects this value (line 112)
examples/woo_commerce_env/scripts/setup_woocommerce.sh line 235: wp wc product create --regular_price='79.99'. This is the initial price when the product is created by the setup script

privileged_info_summary: The 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' product (SKU: WBH-001) is created during environment setup with an initial regular price of $79.99 and no sale price. The task requires updating this product to have a regular price of $59.99 and a sale price of $49.99. All metadata claims match the specified target values and the original price stored in the product creation command.
